on

As the 2024 Paris Olympic Games entres its 12th day, Team Nigeria is set to compete in a series of exciting events across athletics, wrestling, cycling and basketball.

Nigeria’s women’s basketball team, D’Tigress will face the USA in a thrilling quarterfinal matchup, while Samuel Ogazi will attempt to win a medal in the men’s 400m final event.

Also, queen of the tracks, Oluwatibiloba Amusan, will compete in heat 1 of the women’s 100m hurdles, as she attempts to win her first Olympic medal.

Here is the full lineup for Wednesday’s event for Team Nigeria:

Athletics (Stade de France):

– 9:15 AM – Women’s 100m Hurdles Round 1 – Tobi Amusan

– 10:55 AM – Men’s 800m Round 1 – Edose Ibadin

– 6:35 PM – Men’s 400m Hurdles Semi-Final – Ezekiel Nathaniel

– 7:02 PM – Men’s 200m Semi-Final – Udodi Chudi Onwuzurike

– 7:45 PM – Women’s 400m Semi-Final – Ella Onojuvwevwo

Wrestling (Champ-de-Mars Arena Mat B):

– 10:00 AM – Women’s 53kg 1/8 final – Christianah Tolulope Ogunsanya vs. Khulan Batkhuyag*

Cycling Track (Vélodrome de Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines):

– !2:26 PM – Women’s Keirin, First Round – Ese Ukpeseraye

Basketball (Pierre Mauroy Stadium):

– 8:30 PM – Basketball Women’s Quarterfinal – Nigeria vs. United States.
